headline: This health insurer lost 2 million customers — and made $1.5 Billion anyway. Here’s how
summary: When Centene Corporation reported its first-quarter results in late April, the numbers told two stories that seemed impossible to reconcile. The St. Louis-based insurer had hemorrhaged customers, watching its Affordable Care Act marketplace membership collapse from 5.6 million to 3.6 million in just one year — a drop of roughly 2 million people. Yet the ... This health insurer lost 2 million customers — and made $1.5 Billion anyway. Here’s how

headline: Centene (CNC) Is Up 22.6% After Strong Q1 Beat And Raised 2026 Outlook - What's Changed
summary: In late April 2026, Centene Corporation reported first-quarter revenue of US$49.94 billion and net income of US$1.54 billion, with diluted earnings per share from continuing operations of US$3.11, all higher than the same period a year earlier. At the same time, Centene raised its full-year 2026 guidance, projecting total revenue of US$187.50 billion to US$191.50 billion and GAAP diluted EPS above US$2.37, signaling management’s increased confidence in its operating performance and...
